_doc: Hot-reloadable config for equities_alpaca_intraday_bridge.py. Edit and save — takes effect on next run cycle, no restart needed.

_notes.adding_symbols: Add ticker to 'symbols' list AND 'strategy_map'. Cache M5 data first: python3 scripts/download_equity_m5.py --tickers NVDA,META
_notes.breakout_continuation: Works best on high-momentum trending names (TSLA, NVDA, AMD, PLTR)
_notes.grid_reversion: Works best on range-bound / institutional flow names (GOOGL, JPM, META, MSFT)
_notes.max_symbols: Keep ≤10 to stay within notional limits. Adjust INTRADAY_NOTIONAL_USD accordingly.
_notes.disabling_symbol: Remove it from 'symbols' list — strategy_map entry can stay for future use
